---
title: "002_divergence"
output: html_document
date: "2025-09-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
## Read libraries

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
```
## Read diversity 
```{r}
pi_4fold_lyr_pi <- read.table("/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/08_manuscripts/03_results/pi_thaliana_27g_lyrata_31g/thaliana_lyrata_diversity_divergence_4fold_sites_pi.txt", header=T, sep='\t')
pi_4fold_lyr_pi <-pi_4fold_lyr_pi[pi_4fold_lyr_pi$pop=="POP1",]
pi_4fold_lyr_dxy <- read.table("/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/08_manuscripts/03_results/pi_thaliana_27g_lyrata_31g/thaliana_lyrata_diversity_divergence_4fold_sites_dxy.txt", header=T, sep='\t')
## Read centromere informtaion
centromeres <- read.csv2('/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/01_data/tair10/centr_bound.txt',header=T, sep=",")
```
## Calculate average divergence 
```{r}
centromeres <- read.csv2('/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/01_data/tair10/centr_bound.txt',header=T, sep=",")
chromosome_lengths <- data.frame(
  chromosome = c("Chr1", "Chr2", "Chr3", "Chr4", "Chr5"),
  Golden_path_length = c("30427671", "19698289", "23459830", "18585056", "26975502")
)
# Calculate  500 KB widnows 
calc_window <- function(data) {
   data <- data %>%
     mutate(
       window_start = (window_pos_1 %/% 500000) * 500000 + 1,
       window_end = window_start + 499999
     )
   return(data)  # Explicitly return the modified data
}

# Function to average pi to the windows 
average_pi <- function(data){
  data <-data %>% group_by(chromosome, window_start, window_end) %>% dplyr::summarise(avg_pi_window = sum((count_diffs)) / sum(count_comparisons))
  return(data)
}
# Function to calculate gene density
calc_gene_density <- function(data) {
  data <- data %>%
    group_by(chromosome, window_start, window_end) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(gene_count = n())
  return(data)
}
```

```{r}
# Calculate windows 
pi_4fold_lyr <- calc_window(pi_4fold_lyr_pi)
dxy_4fold_lyr <- calc_window(pi_4fold_lyr_dxy)
# Get average pi and dxy 
pi_4fold_lyr <- average_pi(pi_4fold_lyr)
dxy_4fold_lyr <- average_pi(dxy_4fold_lyr)
```


```{r}
avg_pi_with_dxy <- inner_join(pi_4fold_lyr,dxy_4fold_lyr, by=c("chromosome", "window_start", "window_end"), suffix=c("_pi","_dxy"))

generate_windows <- function(chromosome, length) {
  tibble(
    chromosome = chromosome,
    window_start = seq(1, length, by = 500000),
    window_end = (window_start + 500000 - 1))}
# Apply this function to each chromosome to create a complete set of expected windows
expected_windows <- chromosome_lengths %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  do(generate_windows(.$chromosome, .$Golden_path_length)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Impute windows which are not in the data (to have 0)
data_full_range <- expected_windows %>%
  full_join(avg_pi_with_dxy, by = c("chromosome", "window_start", "window_end")) 

# Merge with centromere
data_full_range <- merge(data_full_range, centromeres, by="chromosome")

# Make everything in centromere 0
# Adjust pi values if window falls within the centromere range
data_full_range <- data_full_range %>% dplyr::mutate(avg_pi_window_dxy = ifelse(window_end >= start & window_start <= stop, 0, avg_pi_window_dxy))
data_full_range <- data_full_range %>% dplyr::mutate(avg_pi_window_pi = ifelse(window_end >= start & window_start <= stop, 0, avg_pi_window_pi))

#data_full_range <- data_full_range %>% dplyr::mutate(avg_pi_window_pi = ifelse(window_end >= ancestral_start & window_start <= ancestral_stop, 0, avg_pi_window_pi))
#data_full_range <- data_full_range %>% dplyr::mutate(avg_pi_window_dxy = ifelse(window_end >= ancestral_start & window_start <= ancestral_stop, 0, avg_pi_window_dxy))
```

```{r}
median_pi <- median(data_full_range$avg_pi_window_pi, na.rm = TRUE)
median_dxy <- median(data_full_range$avg_pi_window_dxy, na.rm = TRUE) 

# Reshape to long format
pi_long <- data_full_range %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(avg_pi_window_pi, avg_pi_window_dxy),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "measure"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    metric = case_when(
      metric == "avg_pi_window_pi" ~ "Diversity (π)",
      metric == "avg_pi_window_dxy" ~ "Divergence (dxy)"
    ),
    median_value = case_when(
      metric == "Diversity (π)" ~ median_pi,
      metric == "Divergence (dxy)" ~ median_dxy
    )
  )
```
## Visualize figure 2 
```{r}
pi_long <- pi_long %>%
  mutate(
    metric = factor(metric, levels = c("Diversity (π)", "Divergence (dxy)"))
  )


ggplot(pi_long, aes(x = window_start, y = measure, color = metric)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, size = 1, alpha = 0.6, span = 0.2,fill = "#C9CDCF") +
    geom_point(size = 1.3, alpha = 0.9) +
 # geom_line()+
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = median_value, color = "darkgrey"), 
             linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6, alpha = 0.9)+
  facet_grid(metric ~ chromosome, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Diversity (π)" = "#004030",
    "Divergence (dxy)" = "#B9375D"
  )) +
 # geom_rect(
#    data = data_full_range ,
#    aes(xmin = start - 150000, xmax = stop + 150000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf), 
#    fill = "lightgrey", alpha = 0.3, inherit.aes = FALSE
#  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20) +
  theme(
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"), 
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  xlab("Window Start (Mbp)") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_number(scale = 1e-6))

width_inches <- 12
height_inches <- 8
dpi <- 600
CairoPNG("/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/08_manuscripts/04_figures/only_diversity_all_context_figure1_patterns_separately.png", width = width_inches * dpi, height = height_inches * dpi, dpi = dpi)
print(plot1)
dev.off()
```

## Make a boxplot of divergence
```{r}
data_full_range$pericentromere_start <- data_full_range$start-3000000
data_full_range$pericentromere_stop <- data_full_range$stop+3000000

data_full_range$location <- ifelse(data_full_range$window_start>=data_full_range$pericentromere_start & data_full_range$window_end<=data_full_range$pericentromere_stop, "pericentromere", "arm")
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpubr)

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpubr)

# Wilcoxon tests for each chromosome
results <- data.frame()

for(chr in unique(data_full_range$chromosome)) {
  data_chr <- subset(data_full_range, chromosome == chr)
  
  # PI test
  pi_test <- wilcox.test(avg_pi_window_pi ~ location, data = data_chr)
  results <- rbind(results, data.frame(chr = chr, metric = "PI", p_value = pi_test$p.value))
  
  # DXY test  
  dxy_test <- wilcox.test(avg_pi_window_dxy ~ location, data = data_chr)
  results <- rbind(results, data.frame(chr = chr, metric = "DXY", p_value = dxy_test$p.value))
}

print(results)

# Custom colors
my_colors <- c("arm" = "#EE7600", "pericentromere" = "#1C86EE")  # blue and red
# Or try: c("arm" = "lightblue", "pericentromere" = "coral")
# Or: c("arm" = "#2ecc71", "pericentromere" = "#f39c12")  # green and orange

# Boxplots with custom colors
p1 <- ggplot(data_full_range, aes(x = chromosome, y = avg_pi_window_pi, fill = location)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(position = position_jitterdodge()) + 
  ggtitle("PI") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  stat_compare_means(aes(group = location), method = "wilcox.test", 
                     label = "p.signif", hide.ns = FALSE) +ylab("Pi")+theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(data_full_range, aes(x = chromosome, y = avg_pi_window_dxy, fill = location)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(position = position_jitterdodge()) + 
  ggtitle("DXY") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  stat_compare_means(aes(group = location), method = "wilcox.test", 
                     label = "p.signif", hide.ns = FALSE)+ylab("Dxy")+theme_minimal()

print(p1)
print(p2)
```

## Make a scatterplot 
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# 1) Keep only the two metrics of interest and pivot wider
pi_wide <- pi_long %>%
  select(chromosome, window_start, window_end, metric, measure) %>%
  distinct() %>%  # guard against duplicates per window/metric
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = metric,
    values_from = measure
  ) 

# 2) Basic scatterplot
pi_wide <-pi_wide[pi_wide$`Diversity (π)`>0 & pi_wide$`Divergence (dxy)`>0,]
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(pi_wide, aes(x = `Diversity (π)`, y = `Divergence (dxy)`, color = `Diversity (π)`)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size=4) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +  # or "magma", "viridis", etc.
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20) +
  labs(
    x = "Diversity (π)",
    y = "Divergence (dxy)",
    title = "Diversity vs Divergence per genomic window",
    color = "Diversity (π)"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ chromosome, nrow = 3)
```



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# Ensure chromosome ordering (adjust levels to match your data order if needed)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
# scales >= 1.2.0

# Ensure chromosome order
chr_levels <- c("Chr1","Chr2","Chr3","Chr4","Chr5")  # extend if needed
pi_wide <- pi_wide %>%
  mutate(chromosome = factor(chromosome, levels = chr_levels))

# Chromosome sizes and cumulative offsets
chr_sizes <- pi_wide %>%
  group_by(chromosome) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(chr_len = max(window_end, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(offset = lag(cumsum(chr_len), default = 0))

pi_wide_cum <- pi_wide %>%
  left_join(chr_sizes, by = "chromosome") %>%
  mutate(x_cum = offset + window_start)

# Midpoints for labels
chr_ticks <- chr_sizes %>%
  mutate(x_start = offset,
         x_end = offset + chr_len,
         x_mid = (x_start + x_end)/2)

ggplot(pi_wide_cum,
       aes(x = x_cum,
           y = `Divergence (dxy)`,
           color = `Diversity (π)`)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.4) + geom_smooth()+
  geom_vline(data = chr_sizes, aes(xintercept = offset), color = "grey85") +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = chr_ticks$x_mid,
    labels = as.character(chr_ticks$chromosome),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.005, 0.02))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Chromosome",
    y = "Divergence (dxy)",
    color = "Diversity (π)",
    title = "Divergence vs cumulative genomic position (colored by Diversity)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```
